hero.headlineLineTwo: Clear offers. More trust. Better leads.
hero.subheadline: Hi, I’m M Ayoub — I help businesses turn unclear, outdated websites into focused pages that explain the offer and move visitors toward action.

deliveryLog.message: Goals, users, and conversion blockers mapped
Figma or XD translated into pixel-precise React, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Next.js routing, data fetching, and API layer wired
Forms, APIs, tracking, and front-end integrations wired cleanly
Legacy dependencies detected — performance pass queued
Accessibility, responsive QA, and Core Web Vitals checked before launch
Handoff complete — your team owns the codebase

painPoints: Your Visitors Drop In, But Don't Engage
problemsSolved: Unclear homepage messaging that fails to explain what you do
Weak CTA flow that leaves visitors unsure what to do next
Slow pages that make people bounce before reading the offer
Mobile layouts that break trust on the device most visitors use
Service pages that describe features but do not sell outcomes
Outdated visual design that makes a capable business look less credible
Contact forms and inquiry paths with too much friction
Project handoffs where the business cannot update or reuse the website confidently
Landing pages that get traffic but do not convert enough leads
Competitors feeling more polished, easier to trust, and easier to buy from
whyWork: Code the next dev can read
Problems flagged early, not at launch
You own it when we're done
outcomes: A clearer homepage that explains the offer in seconds
Stronger calls to action and a simpler inquiry path
Pages structured around buyer questions, objections, and next steps
A faster mobile experience that protects trust before the first click
Reusable sections for future campaigns, services, and landing pages
A website that feels more credible against stronger competitors
Clean implementation that your team or next developer can maintain
CMS support only where editing control is genuinely useful

services.name: Homepage Conversion System
services.description: Turn a confusing homepage into a clear sales page that explains your offer, builds trust, and drives inquiries.
services.whatYouGet: A sharper homepage flow, clearer messaging hierarchy, stronger proof placement, better CTA structure, and a build ready for launch.
services.bestFit: Best when people visit your site but still ask what you do, who it is for, or why they should choose you.
features: Homepage narrative built around buyer questions
Proof, outcomes, and objections placed where they matter

services.name: Campaign Landing Page
services.description: A focused landing page for ads, product launches, lead magnets, SaaS offers, or service campaigns.
services.whatYouGet: A conversion-focused page with offer framing, CTA sections, forms, responsive layout, tracking-ready structure, and clean handoff.
services.bestFit: Best when you need a dedicated page for a campaign, service, SaaS idea, or product instead of sending traffic to a general website.
features: Section flow from problem to solution to action
Lead form or booking CTA integration

services.name: Website Redesign Sprint
services.description: Modernize a dated website, improve credibility, fix the mobile experience, and strengthen conversion paths.
services.whatYouGet: Visual hierarchy cleanup, modern section design, clearer service positioning, improved responsiveness, and implementation support.
services.bestFit: Best when your business is good, but the website makes prospects hesitate or compare you unfavorably with competitors.
features: Trust signals and proof made more visible

services.name: Product / SaaS Front End
services.description: Build a polished product interface, MVP front end, dashboard, or web app experience with clean implementation.
services.whatYouGet: Reusable UI components, responsive screens, state-aware interface patterns, API-ready structure, and maintainable front-end delivery.
services.bestFit: Best when you have an MVP, internal tool, SaaS interface, or product idea that needs a clean user experience.
features: Empty, loading, error, and responsive states
Clean code handoff for future development

services.name: UX, Speed & Mobile Cleanup
services.description: Fix the friction points that make visitors bounce: speed, forms, mobile layout, broken UI, and unclear CTAs.
services.whatYouGet: Focused fixes across performance, spacing, mobile layout, forms, broken interactions, and high-friction user paths.
services.bestFit: Best when the website mostly exists, but users hit friction before they inquire, book, buy, or trust the brand.
features: Speed and Core Web Vitals improvements

services.name: Editable Website System
services.description: Create reusable sections and editable content workflows so your team can update the site after launch.
services.whatYouGet: An editing-friendly setup with structured content, reusable templates, CMS guidance, and a handoff your team can actually use.
services.bestFit: Best when content changes often and the team needs practical editing control after launch.
features: WordPress or CMS only when it solves the business need

services.name: Store Conversion Cleanup
services.description: Improve product clarity, trust signals, mobile store UX, and checkout flow for better sales confidence.
services.whatYouGet: Product page cleanup, cart/checkout improvements, trust signals, payment flow support, and mobile conversion fixes.
services.bestFit: Best for stores with traffic but weak conversion, confusing product pages, or a checkout flow customers do not trust.

services.name: Website Growth & Support
services.description: Ongoing website improvements, fixes, new sections, content updates, and technical support after launch.
services.whatYouGet: A practical monthly support lane for small improvements, performance checks, bug fixes, campaign updates, and launch follow-through.
services.bestFit: Best when the site is live but still needs steady iteration, technical care, and quick changes without starting a new project every time.

process.title: Discovery & Planning
process.description: We clarify business goals, target users, current blockers, success metrics, technical requirements, and project scope.

process.title: Solution Design
process.description: I define the structure before build: page flow, components, APIs, CMS needs, integrations, hosting, and deployment plan.

process.title: Development
process.description: I build in visible milestones with clean, responsive, maintainable implementation and feedback loops throughout.

process.title: Testing & QA
process.description: Functionality, forms, responsiveness, browser behavior, performance, accessibility, and edge cases are checked before launch.

process.title: Deployment & Launch
process.description: Production deployment, domain and hosting setup, SSL, analytics, final QA, and launch handoff are handled carefully.

process.title: Support & Growth
process.description: After launch, I can help with improvements, maintenance, new features, performance monitoring, and scaling needs.

about.story: I'm a Front-End Engineer based in Faisalabad, Pakistan. I build React and Next.js interfaces for startups, agencies, and product teams — and WordPress sites for businesses that need a CMS their team can actually manage.
about.motivation: Most of the projects I'm brought onto have the same root problem: a UI that was built fast but not built to last. Hard to extend, slow to load, impossible to hand off. I fix that — and make sure the next developer doesn't have to start from scratch.
about.originStory: I started web development in 2018. In the early times, I did not have an internet connection at home, so I used my friends' internet to download tutorials, then watched them offline to learn HTML, CSS, and the fundamentals. That beginning made me self-learned, resourceful, and passionate about building useful things.
about.education: Master of Computer Science, University of Sahiwal

storyCards.label: How I got into web development
storyCards.title: Self-learning shaped how I build
storyCards.text: That start taught me to be patient, resourceful, and practical when learning new tools or solving project problems.

storyCards.label: What I enjoy building
storyCards.title: Useful websites, product pages, and internal tools
storyCards.text: I enjoy turning designs and ideas into fast React, Next.js, WordPress, and WooCommerce experiences that are clean to manage after launch.

storyCards.label: Who I work with
storyCards.title: Founders, agencies, and product teams
storyCards.text: Most of my work is with people who need dependable implementation, practical communication, and a site or interface their team can keep improving.

experienceLog.title: Senior Website Developer

faqs.question: How long does a typical project take?
faqs.answer: Small landing pages usually take 3–10 days. Redesigns and product front ends usually take 2–5 weeks depending on scope, content, integrations, and feedback speed.

faqs.question: Do you only design or also develop?
faqs.answer: I develop the final website or front end. I can work from your design, improve an existing design, or help structure the page before implementation.

faqs.question: What can I hire you for?
faqs.answer: Homepage conversion, landing pages, website redesigns, product front ends, speed/mobile cleanup, editable website systems, and store conversion improvements.

faqs.question: Do you work with international clients?
faqs.answer: Yes. I work remotely with founders, agencies, businesses, and product teams across different time zones.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing support?
faqs.answer: Yes. After launch I can help with maintenance, bug fixes, new sections, performance improvements, and feature enhancements.

faqs.question: Do you share pricing upfront?
faqs.answer: Yes. Services use starting-from pricing to qualify scope quickly. Final pricing depends on pages, complexity, integrations, content readiness, and timeline.
